name: Bull-Dog Sauce Co., Ltd.
summary: Bull-Dog Sauce Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells sauces, pasta, and seasonings in Japan. The company was formerly known as Bull-Dog Foods Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Bull-Dog Sauce Co., Ltd. in 1962. Bull-Dog Sauce Co., Ltd. was founded in 1902 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
